summary: On April 14-15, 2026, Russian operators from the Rubicon Center reported destroying 107 Ukrainian UAVs on the 15th and 193 on the 14th, including fixed-wing platforms, across the Donbas, Belgorod, Sumy, and Krasny Liman axes, while coordinating with Russian Aerospace Forces to strike Ukrainian UAV launch sites. Russian forces captured a Ukrainian Shark-M fixed-wing UAV after its parachute deployed from a kinetic interception by the Elka anti-aircraft drone on the Krasny Liman axis, and intercepted a Hornet strike UAV with the Yolka system, triggering its warhead. Russia tested group deployment technology for S350M Supercam strike drones using an upgraded data transmission system for automatic target information exchange. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to destroy two Russian soldiers on motorcycles and later killed a Russian soldier who attempted to fake surrender and flee. Ukrainian EW interference was observed, with operators warning targets to land FPV drones within 15 seconds, while Ukrainian troops in the Kostiantinivka direction survived a Russian FPV attack after detecting the drone with a handheld detector.
